initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c_customer_sk
FROM store_sales
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE web_sales.ws_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_month_seq = date_dim.d_month_seq + 1
)
LIMIT 100
initial_candidates.exec_error:
Binder Error: Referenced table "web_sales" not found!
Candidate tables: "store_sales"

LINE 9:     WHERE web_sales.ws_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
                  ^
